title: poa dentigluma
intro: Poa dentigluma is a species of grass native to the mountainous regions of China, often referred to as a wild grass or a type of alpine grass. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. Poa dentigluma is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and treating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antitussive properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it can also be used to make medicinal soups or poultices.
